name: Consumer AI Viral 50 - Source Weighted
description: Same 50 consumer AI viral ideas, with the user-provided author composite scores attached as idea-specific external evidence before simulation.

ideas.name: UGC Ad Twin
ideas.summary: Turn a product link, a few photos, and a creator/persona choice into native-looking short-video ads for sellers, creators, resellers, and DTC micro-brands.

ideas.name: Glow-Up Coach
ideas.summary: AI beauty, hair, makeup, skincare, and outfit transformations with try-on storyboards, daily plans, product links, and social before/after cards.

ideas.name: Meme-to-Motion Studio
ideas.summary: Convert screenshots, memes, and reaction images into motion clips, voiceovers, remix chains, and export-ready TikTok/Reels/X posts.

ideas.name: PhotoDump Director
ideas.summary: Turn camera rolls into cinematic social mini-movies with scripts, cutdowns, subtitles, cover art, and trend-native 15/30/60-second edits.

ideas.name: Outfit Roulette
ideas.summary: Scan a closet, weather, and calendar to generate daily outfits, visual try-on grids, and social "rate my fit" poll cards.

ideas.name: Pet Dub Universe
ideas.summary: Make a pet into a recurring character with consistent voice, expressions, episodic plots, captions, skit templates, and merch mockups.

ideas.name: Dating Profile Studio
ideas.summary: Optimize dating profiles with photo sequencing, prompt rewrites, opener suggestions, voice-note practice, mock conversations, and authenticity-first exports.

ideas.name: Family Lore Studio
ideas.summary: Transform family photos, voice notes, and text into narrated mini-documentaries, timelines, gentle restorations, videos, books, and family-sharing artifacts.

ideas.name: Fan Trailer Generator
ideas.summary: Turn prompts, original characters, or licensed-safe asset packs into "coming soon" trailers, posters, soundtrack moments, and fandom challenge exports.

ideas.name: Fridge-to-Recipe Reel
ideas.summary: Turn fridge scans into step-by-step meals, grocery substitutions, nutrition ranges, and auto-generated cooking reels or recipe cards.

ideas.name: Room Remix
ideas.summary: Upload a room and get redesign options, mood variants, budget sliders, shoppable bundles, and social before/after comparison cards.

ideas.name: Future Self Simulator
ideas.summary: Visualize future versions of yourself across fitness, fashion, career, location, family, aging, and aspirational life-path scenarios.

ideas.name: Goal Accountability Montage
ideas.summary: Turn streaks and habits into weekly montage recaps, proof cards, friend competitions, group leaderboards, and milestone celebration clips.

ideas.name: Couple Compatibility Show
ideas.summary: Convert couple questionnaires, voice notes, and photos into a playful game-show-style compatibility recap with private sharing and event packs.

ideas.name: Wedding Speech Studio
ideas.summary: Create wedding speeches, roasts, rehearsal videos, timing feedback, cards, and keepsake outputs from memories and anecdotes.

ideas.name: Creator Comment-to-Video Engine
ideas.summary: Let fans leave prompts or comments and turn them into creator-style response videos with scripts, moderation, and creator approval.

ideas.name: Gift Maker
ideas.summary: Transform chat logs, photos, and memories into personalized roasts, tribute reels, cards, mini-sites, and printable social gifts.

ideas.name: Running Hype Clips
ideas.summary: Turn run data, route maps, splits, and selfies into cinematic motivational edits with map animations, overlays, and race/event packs.

ideas.name: Workout Form and Progress Coach
ideas.summary: Combine form analysis, smart cues, exercise detection, and progress timelapse clips for gym-goers and home fitness users.

ideas.name: Personal Finance Money Story
ideas.summary: Turn spending and saving behavior into story-driven recaps, money archetypes, anonymous comparison cards, and social savings challenges.

ideas.name: Friend Group Weekly Magazine
ideas.summary: Turn selected group-chat moments, photos, polls, and weekend highlights into a recurring magazine cover and recap issue.

ideas.name: Microlearning Quiz Battles
ideas.summary: Generate 30-second quiz battles from any topic and let users challenge friends, creators, classrooms, or public audiences.

ideas.name: Parenting Milestone Storyteller
ideas.summary: Turn child milestones into tasteful recap stories, timeline reels, family invites, prints, and annual parent-friendly memory bundles.

ideas.name: Kids Storybook Studio
ideas.summary: Make personalized children's books with consistent characters, illustrated pages, read-aloud audio, recurring series, and print bundles.

ideas.name: Screenshot Concierge
ideas.summary: Turn screenshots and saved posts into actionable plans, wishlists, shopping comparisons, trip boards, reminders, and shareable compare cards.

ideas.name: Beauty Routine Twin
ideas.summary: Track skincare, cosmetics, and routines visually, then create progress reels, product organizers, week recaps, and cosmetic-not-diagnostic suggestions.

ideas.name: Closet Commerce Copilot
ideas.summary: Use closet photos and screenshots to find gaps, dupes, resale opportunities, outfit packs, and shop-your-closet capsule plans.

ideas.name: Dream Visualizer
ideas.summary: Convert dream notes or voice memos into surreal visuals, mini-stories, style variants, printables, and a private creative journal.

ideas.name: Language Roleplay Selfie Tutor
ideas.summary: Put the learner into visual roleplay scenes and practice everyday scenarios with AI voice, corrections, cues, and travel packs.

ideas.name: Voice Journal Coach
ideas.summary: Transcribe voice journals into themes, progress arcs, weekly recaps, safety-aware reflection prompts, and optional polished share cards.

ideas.name: Travel Alternate Self and Planner
ideas.summary: Show yourself in destinations, itineraries, and aesthetics before booking, then generate trip boards and sample plans.

ideas.name: Party Icebreaker Generator
ideas.summary: Create personalized party quizzes, dares, who-is-most-likely cards, themed decks, and mobile/projector party modes.

ideas.name: Local Event Social Planner
ideas.summary: Generate event itineraries, invite cards, group polls, social assets, and city weekend plans from local listings.

ideas.name: Digital Clone for DM Replies
ideas.summary: Train a safe personal reply twin for creator FAQs, intros, routine messages, dating replies, and approval-based multi-channel responses.

ideas.name: Hobby Coach With Brag Clips
ideas.summary: Coach and showcase progress in guitar, chess, cooking, dance, and other hobbies with feedback, weekly clips, and niche challenges.

ideas.name: News Bias Mirror
ideas.summary: Compare how different outlets frame the same story in side-by-side cards or videos with citations and confidence labels.

ideas.name: Study Sprint Storymaker
ideas.summary: Turn study sessions into animated recaps, quiz cards, flashcard decks, streak brag posts, and student leaderboard clips.

ideas.name: Personal Myth Generator
ideas.summary: Turn a user's tastes, photos, and prompts into a personal fantasy lore universe with archetype quiz, portraits, lore cards, and trailer.

ideas.name: Roast and Compliment Trading Cards
ideas.summary: Turn opt-in personality inputs into funny trading cards, friend comparisons, roast battles, squad decks, and branded packs.

ideas.name: Creator Collab Graph
ideas.summary: Show creators who they should collaborate with based on audience/style overlap and generate pitch assets, intro decks, and marketplace leads.

ideas.name: AI Debate Shorts
ideas.summary: Generate concise debate clips where users pick sides, cite sources, share their version, duet prompts, and build public argument threads.

ideas.name: Resume-to-Content Career Coach
ideas.summary: Convert a resume and goals into portfolio content, interview stories, career-brand assets, mock interviews, and LinkedIn post kits.

ideas.name: Moodboard-to-Brand Kit
ideas.summary: Turn a moodboard into name ideas, visual identity, colors, fonts, starter site, landing page, and social post templates.

ideas.name: Micro-podcast Clip Maker
ideas.summary: Turn voice notes or text into short social audio/video clips with motion graphics, captions, cover art, and summaries.

ideas.name: Baby Name Universe
ideas.summary: Generate name aesthetics, meanings, nursery moodboards, pronunciation audio, registry links, and family poll cards for expectant parents.

ideas.name: Offline Private Bestie
ideas.summary: On-device private AI companion for journaling, notes, voice memories, local chat, document summarization, and paid local model packs.

ideas.name: Deal and Dupe Scout
ideas.summary: Find cheaper lookalikes or better-value alternatives from screenshots and saved products with price tracking and shareable deal cards.

ideas.name: Fandom Trope Storyboard Studio
ideas.summary: Generate trope boards, scene cards, title cards, and original-character visual stories for fan creators and roleplayers.

ideas.name: Habit League
ideas.summary: Turn personal habits into seasonal leagues with team drafts, standings, weekly recap reels, public scorecards, and creator-hosted tournaments.

ideas.name: Neighborhood Swap and DIY Visualizer
ideas.summary: Show how thrift finds, used furniture, or swap items would look in your space before trading or buying.

evidence.source: Public trend scan
evidence.note: Short-form social remains the distribution layer for consumer launches.

evidence.source: AI tooling scan
evidence.note: Coding agents, image/video generation, voice, and browser agents lower launch cost.

evidence.source: AI slop backlash
evidence.note: Generated novelty alone decays quickly unless tied to human proof, identity, or utility.

evidence.source: Creator/social commerce benchmarks
evidence.note: Creator, commerce, and utility workflows show stronger monetization than generic toys.
